excerpt.value: Airtable is an app platform that connects people and data across business workflows.
Airtable offers Free, Team, Business, and Enterprise Scale plans.
Build apps on shared data and automate workflows across teams.
Customer stories show how teams run workflows and operations on Airtable.
Teams use Airtable to manage product operations, marketing, finance, and more.
Airtable helps teams bring their data and workflows together.
Airtable offers contact-sales paths for larger teams and enterprise needs.
